label: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR)

node.label: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR)
node.definition: RLVR improves a policy using rewards computed by deterministic or highly reliable verifiers such as tests, exact answers, simulators, or proof kernels.
node.why_it_matters: It scales post-training feedback in domains where correctness can be checked automatically.
limitations: Verifiable endpoints can reward shortcuts, reduce solution diversity, or omit qualities that are difficult to formalize.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has a `uses` dependency on Reinforcement learning because Reinforcement learning is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.

In this atlas graph, Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has an `optimizes_for` dependency on Outcome verifiers & executable rewards because Outcome verifiers & executable rewards is modeled as the objective family for learning, selection, or evaluation.

In this atlas graph, Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has a `uses` dependency on Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) because Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.

In this atlas graph, Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has a `uses` dependency on Data augmentation & synthetic-data generation because Data augmentation & synthetic-data generation is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.

sentence_units.text: RLVR improves a policy using rewards computed by deterministic or highly reliable verifiers such as tests, exact answers, simulators, or proof kernels.
It scales post-training feedback in domains where correctness can be checked automatically.
Verifiable endpoints can reward shortcuts, reduce solution diversity, or omit qualities that are difficult to formalize.
